description_long: This is a rectangular, dark brown wooden toolbox with three horizontal drawers on the front, each featuring a brass-colored handle. The surface is adorned with subtle engraved decorative patterns, adding a touch of elegance to its otherwise utilitarian design. The top is flat and bordered by a recessed rectangular panel, while the sides each have a single matching brass handle for easy carrying. The back is plain, with only decorative engravings and no visible hardware. The overall construction appears sturdy and solid, suggesting it is designed to store and organize tools securely. The finish is smooth and slightly glossy, giving the box a refined, classic appearance suitable for both functional and decorative use in urban garages or workshops.
description: A dark brown wooden toolbox with three brass-handled drawers and decorative engravings, featuring a smooth, slightly glossy finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing three horizontal drawers, each with a brass handle and decorative engravings.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying a single brass handle and subtle engraved patterns, with no drawers visible.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing a plain surface with decorative engravings and no handles or drawers.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with a single brass handle and engraved details.
attribute_handle_type: Fixed, rectangular brass handles on the front of each drawer and on both sides; handles are solid, metallic, and ergonomically shaped for grip.
attribute_latch_mechanism: No visible external latch or locking mechanism; drawers appear to be held closed by friction or internal stops.
attribute_compartment_configuration: Three horizontally stacked drawers on the front, each likely forming a separate compartment; no visible internal dividers or removable trays.
